diff_text:
--- a/models.py
+++ b/models.py
@@ -20,3 +20,3 @@
 class User:
-    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
+    profile_url: str
--- a/serializer.py
+++ b/serializer.py
@@ -8,3 +8,3 @@
 def serialize_user(user):
-    url = user.profile_url if user.profile_url else ''
+    url = user.profile_url

causal_chain.description: Making field non-nullable means old data might be missing it, but serializer removes fallback causing AttributeError on .lower().
Making field non-nullable means old data might be missing it, but serializer removes fallback causing AttributeError on .lower().
